endpoints.name: GET /contacts
endpoints.description: Returns a list of student contacts
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CLEVER_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your CLEVER ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /contacts/{id}
endpoints.description: Returns a specific student contact
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CLEVER_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your CLEVER ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /contacts/{id}/district
endpoints.description: Returns the district for a student contact
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CLEVER_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your CLEVER ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /contacts/{id}/student
endpoints.description: Returns the student for a student contact
